headline: Meta's Novi Cryptocurrency Wallet Is Shutting Down: What You Need To Know
summary: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) owned Novi digital wallet will be shut down by September. The company announced that the final day to add funds would be July 20.

headline: Jeff Bezos $500M Superyacht Is Stuck In Dutch City: Here's How It Happened And Why Locals Are Outraged
summary: One of the world’s richest people may not get his superyacht anytime soon. A massive 417-foot superyacht built for Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) founder Jeff Bezos is stuck with a bridge in the way.

headline: A Forgettable First-Half: Here's How Apple And Other FAANGs Performed Amid Market Turbulence
summary: The first half of 2022 was nightmarish for the stock market, with fears of an imminent recession and supply chain disruptions working in the mind of investors.

headline: Apple Watch Series 8 Will Be Able To Tell If You're Sick With This New Detection Feature: Report
summary:
Those Apple loyalists who plan to buy the Apple Watch Series 8 when it launches this fall can look forward to an added utility.

Apple Watch Series 8 will have body-temperature detection as a new feature in both the standard option and a new rugged edition targeting extreme sports athletes, Bloomberg columnist Mark Gurman  said in his Power-On weekly newsletter.

headline: Will Donald Trump Launch A 2024 Presidential Election Bid On Fourth Of July? Here's What We Know
summary: The 2024 Presidential Election could feature a rematch between two former presidents, with both former President Donald Trump and current president Joe Biden eyeing re-election. Neither candidate has announced plans to officially run in 2024. Although, a new report points to Trump announcing soon and being the first of the two to make things official.

headline: 'Minions: The Rise Of Gru' Steamrolls The Competition At The Holiday Weekend Box Office
summary: “Minions: The Rise of Gru” took over the U.S. box office, with Comscore data pointing to $109.5 million in ticket sales for the three-day weekend and $129.2 million forecasted for the four-day weekend from 4,391 theaters.

headline: Ouch — Jeff Bezos Slams Biden For Blaming Gas Stations: Here's What The Amazon Founder Said
summary: Amazon.com, Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) founder Jeff Bezos has blasted President Joe Biden over his latest remarks asking gas companies to cut their prices amid rising inflation.

headline: This Warren Buffett-Backed Chinese EV Maker Reports June Sales Up Over 240% From A Year Ago
summary: Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer BYD Company Limited (OTC: BYDDY) reported Sunday deliveries that more than tripled from a year ago.

headline: Analysis: What Movies Audiences Wanted (And Rejected) During The First Half Of 2022
summary:
The first half of 2022’s movie year was marked with several intriguing surprises that could reshape film production and exhibition trends for years to come.
